glmassume 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Diagnosing GLMs with glmassume

glmassume: Visualize and Diagnose GLM Assumptions

Source: R/glmassume-package.R
glmassume-package.Rd

Tools for visualizing and diagnosing assumptions of generalized linear models (GLMs). Supports binomial, Poisson, negative binomial, Gamma, inverse Gaussian, and Gaussian families. Provides diagnostic plots and statistical tests for assessing linearity of the link function, residual patterns, influential observations, multicollinearity, overdispersion, and goodness of fit.

See also

  • https://github.com/dusty-turner/glmassume
